description_long: This figure depicts a regal adult woman dressed in an elaborate, floor-length gown with layered skirts and ornate gold trim. The bodice is structured with heart motifs and armored shoulder pads, giving her a commanding presence. She wears long gloves and a high collar, and her hair is styled in voluminous curls, topped with a crown-like accessory. The character holds a scepter adorned with a large heart and intricate gold detailing, emphasizing her royal status. The back of her dress features a long, flowing cape and additional heart-shaped embellishments. The overall design is highly stylized, blending fantasy and aristocratic elements.
description: A regal adult woman in a layered, ornate gown with gold trim, heart motifs, and a crown, holding a decorative scepter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed bodice, heart motifs, scepter, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered skirt, shoulder armor, and the scepter's length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long cape, back of the crown, and heart-shaped embellishments on the dress.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the profile of the dress, gloves, and the flowing skirt.
attribute_clothing_type: ornate ball gown with structured bodice, layered skirt, armored shoulder pads, long gloves, and a high collar
attribute_hairstyle: long, voluminous curls styled up with a crown accessory
